languages.text: "Довольно болтовни. Тавриск, начинай!" {n}Старик с тассерциевыми глазами, надрывно хрипя, исторгает из беззубого рта поток нечестивых слов, начертанные под вашей клеткой линии словно делают вдох, наливаясь багряным светом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Довольно болтовни. Тавриск, начинай!" {n}Старик с тассерциевыми глазами, надрывно хрипя, исторгает из беззубого рта поток нечестивых слов, начертанные под вашей клеткой линии словно делают вдох, наливаясь багряным светом.{/n}

languages.text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Довольно болтовни. Тавриск, начинай!" {n}Старик с тассерциевыми глазами, надрывно хрипя, исторгает из беззубого рта поток нечестивых слов, начертанные под вашей клеткой линии словно делают вдох, наливаясь багряным светом.{/n}

"Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

languages.text: “闲聊到此为止。塔夫瑞克，动手吧！”{n}听到这句话，那个双眼镶嵌着塔瑟拉水晶的老人嘶哑地喘息起来，没有牙齿的口中吐出一连串邪恶的话语。你笼子旁边的印记爆发出了深红色的光芒，仿佛在呼吸一样。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “闲聊到此为止。塔夫瑞克，动手吧！”{n}听到这句话，那个双眼镶嵌着塔瑟拉水晶的老人嘶哑地喘息起来，没有牙齿的口中吐出一连串邪恶的话语。你笼子旁边的印记爆发出了深红色的光芒，仿佛在呼吸一样。{/n}

languages.text: «Basta de cháchara. ¡Tavrisk, empiece ya!». {n}Respirando con dificultad, el anciano de los ojos de thassertio escupe un torrente de blasfemias por su desdentada boca, y los símbolos que hay debajo de tu jaula se iluminan con un fulgor carmesí como si absorbieran la diabólica letanía.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Basta de cháchara. ¡Tavrisk, empiece ya!». {n}Respirando con dificultad, el anciano de los ojos de thassertio escupe un torrente de blasfemias por su desdentada boca, y los símbolos que hay debajo de tu jaula se iluminan con un fulgor carmesí como si absorbieran la diabólica letanía.{/n}

languages.text: "Yeter bu kadar laf salatası. Tavrisk, başla!" {n}Tasertiyum gözlü yaşlı adam, hırıltılı bir şekilde dişsiz ağzından kutsal olmayan kelimelerden bir sel kusuyor. Bunun üzerine kafesinin altındaki işaretler, sanki içeri doğru nefes alıp kızıl bir ışıkla parlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yeter bu kadar laf salatası. Tavrisk, başla!" {n}Tasertiyum gözlü yaşlı adam, hırıltılı bir şekilde dişsiz ağzından kutsal olmayan kelimelerden bir sel kusuyor. Bunun üzerine kafesinin altındaki işaretler, sanki içeri doğru nefes alıp kızıl bir ışıkla parlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「おしゃべりは十分だ。タヴリスク、始めろ！」{n}タッセリウムの目を持つ老人は、かすれた喘鳴を鳴らし、歯のない口から不浄な言葉を発し、牢屋の下のマーキングが息をするように深紅の光で発光する。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「おしゃべりは十分だ。タヴリスク、始めろ！」{n}タッセリウムの目を持つ老人は、かすれた喘鳴を鳴らし、歯のない口から不浄な言葉を発し、牢屋の下のマーキングが息をするように深紅の光で発光する。{/n}

languages.text: « Assez bavassé. Au travail, Tavrisk ! » {n}La respiration rauque, le vieil homme aux yeux en thassertium crache un torrent de paroles impies, donnant vie aux marques sous votre cage qui se mettent à briller d'une lueur écarlate.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Assez bavassé. Au travail, Tavrisk ! » {n}La respiration rauque, le vieil homme aux yeux en thassertium crache un torrent de paroles impies, donnant vie aux marques sous votre cage qui se mettent à briller d'une lueur écarlate.{/n}

languages.text: "Genug geplaudert. Tavrisk, fangt an!" {n}Der alte Mann mit den Thassertimaugen speit keuchend und röchelnd einen Schwall unheiliger Wörter aus seinem zahnlosen Mund. Die Markierungen unter deinem Käfig scheinen einzuatmen und leuchten rot auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough chitchat. Tavrisk, begin!" {n}The old man with the thassertium eyes, wheezing raspily, spews a torrent of unholy words from his toothless mouth, and the markings beneath your cage seem to breathe in, glowing with crimson light.{/n}
